containers.note: List area; web crt.DataTable maps to mobile crt.List.

components.note: Folder tree. The mobile template (BaseMobileListTemplate) already provides the FolderTreeActions element; carry the web folder-schema binding (sourceSchemaName + rootSchemaName) onto it by merge-by-name so the mobile folder tree resolves the section entity. Without this the web crt.FolderTree node (inherited template chrome) is pruned and rootSchemaName is lost.

templates.note: Tabbed record page (Tabs + Feed + Attachments). Preferred target for web tabbed record pages.

containers.note: The mobile template provides the Feed and Attachments tabs (FeedTab, AttachmentsTab) — they must stay LAST. Insert every converted web tab BEFORE them (after the general tab), so tab order is: general tab, converted web tabs, Feed, Attachments.
Feed tab content; the FeedTab stays the second-to-last tab (before Attachments).
Attachments tab content; the AttachmentsTab stays the LAST tab.
Web card-content wrapper; its non-tab content (side/profile) fills the mobile general tab's grid.
Content ABOVE the web card-content wrapper (e.g. a progress bar) is placed above the mobile Tabs (in the Tabs' parent container).
Content BELOW the web card-content wrapper is placed below the mobile Tabs.

templates.note: Base record page (non-tabbed). Web BasePageFreedomTemplate maps to the mobile base record page.
Blank page. Mobile blank exposes only the Scaffold root.
Base page template; maps to the mobile base record page. Universal fallback container is MainContainer.
Base web template root; maps to the mobile structural root. Universal fallback container is MainContainer.

components.note: Boolean fields on mobile use crt.Toggle instead of the web crt.Checkbox.
Rich text on mobile uses crt.RichTextEditor instead of the web crt.HtmlEditor.

Web grid → mobile crt.List + crt.ListItem. The crt.ListItem must be added INTO the crt.List's `itemLayout` — it defines the row layout (`title` + `body`). Map each grid column's `code` to a `$<code>` binding: the first column becomes the ListItem `title`, the remaining columns become its `body` rows (`{ "value": "$<code>" }`); the grid `items` binding carries over to the list `items`. A column's `code` is its bound attribute name. Note: if the mobile template already provides the `List`/`ListItem` elements, configure them by merge-by-name (the row goes on the `ListItem` element) rather than inserting new ones.
Many->one: mobile FolderTreeActions is produced from web crt.FolderTree (primary); web crt.FolderTreeActions is consumed. Values are reconciled against the mobile component's registry contract.
